package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormBootstrapWithRawSqlRepositoriesWithoutAdapterBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_bootstrap_with_raw_sql_repositories_without_adapter_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Codebases that bootstrap persistence with GORM but run repository queries through raw SQL without a clear adapter boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
